chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1061 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution. 31.10.2016. None present for the petitioner. = The order sheet shows that for the past couple of days, petitioner is not proceeding with the matter nor the cost of the petition has been paid. In the present petition, the petitioner inter-alia has mainly sought a restraining order that she should not be harassed by respondents No.2 to 5 and police officials should discharge their duties in accordance with law. Notwithstanding, the default on the part of the petitioner, it appears that she is an old lady and being citizen of this Country is atleast entitled for the relief that if she approaches the police officials/respondents for help and protection, the same should be provided to her strictly in accordance with law. With these observations, the present petition stands disposed of. A copy of this order should be communicated to the learned Additional A.G Sindh for compliance and necessary action. JUDGE Shahid
